title: ruellia californica subsp. californica
intro: Ruellia californica subsp. californica, also known as California petunia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Mexico, known for its blue-purple flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throat, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and soothe skin irritations.
